heading.usage: H1-H4, large display text. Tight tracking tracking-tight.

animations.hero: Framer Motion: Initial opacity 0, y 40. Staggered reveal for text. Floating product mockups using y: [0, -20, 0] transition easeInOut infinity.
animations.scroll: Smooth scroll required (Lenis recommended). Framer Motion whileInView={ opacity: 1, y: 0 } viewport={{ once: true, margin: '-100px' }} for section reveals.
animations.hover_effects: Cards slightly lift (-translate-y-2) and gain orange ambient glow. Images inside masonry galleries zoom in slightly (scale-105) with CSS transition.
animations.marquee: Infinite slow scroll for 'Industries Trusted By' logos. Use low contrast/opacity for logos.

components.navbar: Sticky, fixed top. Starts transparent, becomes bg-black/80 backdrop-blur-xl on scroll. Logo left, links center, 'Get Quote' primary button right. z-50.
components.hero: Dark background. Large Clash Display headline. High contrast. Parallax floating packaging visuals. Use gradient overlay on images if needed to preserve text readability.

buttons.primary: bg-[#F45A2A] text-white rounded-full px-8 py-4 font-medium hover:bg-[#D9481D] transition-colors shadow-[0_4px_20px_rgba(244,90,42,0.3)]
buttons.secondary: bg-transparent border border-white/20 text-white rounded-full px-8 py-4 hover:bg-white/5 transition-colors backdrop-blur-sm

components.bento_grid: Neomorphic dark cards. Mix of col-span-1 and col-span-2. Use generous internal padding (p-8) to prevent text collision. Asymmetrical layouts.
components.masonry_gallery: Columns of varying heights. Images have grayscale filter that turns to color on hover. Soft rounded corners (rounded-2xl).
components.multi_step_form: Shadcn based. Progress bar at top with orange highlights. Neomorphic inputs (bg-[#1A1A1A] border-white/10 focus:border-[#F45A2A]). File upload drag-and-drop zone with dashed border.
components.footer: Deep dark aesthetic (bg-[#0D0D0D]). Large 'Let's Talk' typography. Newsletter input with orange arrow submit button.

testing.instructions: All interactive elements (buttons, links, form inputs, toggles, accordions) must have a data-testid attribute formatted as kebab-case, role-based. e.g., data-testid='navbar-get-quote-button'.

instructions_to_main_agent: Use pure HTML + Tailwind for complex marketing layouts (Hero, Bento Grid) to allow maximum structural freedom. Avoid restricting them inside Shadcn cards.
Use Shadcn for interactive components (Forms, Accordion, Carousels, Dialogs) but strip generic borders and apply the dark neomorphic styles.
Implement Lenis for smooth scrolling in the main layout wrapper.
Ensure the hero section uses Framer Motion for a staggered text reveal and floating animation on the image.
The website should be strictly dark-themed by default. Ensure 'dark' class is applied or dark colors are hardcoded as defaults.
Ensure 'data-testid' is present on all interactive components.
